## moveTaskToParentDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `move-to-parent` command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `move-to-parent` and the MCP tool `task_move`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript

    parentTaskId: string;
```
